name: Florida Bay Snickers Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a 9-inch pie shell, remove the fluted rim and place the pie shell in the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Bake in a 350°F oven until golden brown. Allow the pan to cool, then grease the sides of the pan; set aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, vanilla, and 1 egg. With a flat beater, mix until smooth. Scrape down the sides of the bowl with a spatula and add the remaining 2 eggs. Mix until smooth and completely blended.
3. Cut each Snickers candy bar lengthwise, then cut crosswise into 14 to 16 pieces. Fold the Snickers chunks into the cream cheese batter using a rubber spatula. Pour the batter into the prepared crust in the spring-form pan.
4. Bake in a 275°F oven for 2 hours. Cool completely in the refrigerator.
5. Remove from the springform pan and place on a service plate. Melt caramels with 1 tablespoon whipping cream in a microwave oven. Remove from the microwave and blend completely with a whisk. Spread the caramel on top of the cheesecake, within 1 inch of the edge.
6. Melt semisweet chocolate morsels with 3 tablespoons whipping cream in a microwave oven for 30 seconds on high setting. Remove from the microwave, blend completely with a whisk, and spread over the cheesecake over the caramel to within 1/2 inch of the edge.
7. Sprinkle the top of the cheesecake with chopped peanuts.
